标签: MM6 is a women's shoe brand.
标题: Personal shopper level Christian Louboutin 25ss Spring/Summer new single shoes designed by John Galliano and shoe master Christian Louboutin. The design creatively combines the two brands' design genes, presenting a unique style with common elements. The designer's classic red sole is reinterpreted with exquisite craftsmanship: crafted from two independent materials instead of the traditional toe separation cutting technique, giving the shoes an elegant heart-shaped silhouette, resembling a woman's collarbone. Deeply rooted in the collective subconscious, captivating imagery injects subtle and understated sensuality into the classic Tabi shoe style. Each piece from CL is filled with bold design and unique artistic sense, from deconstructive outerwear to futuristic accessories, every detail showcases Margiela's avant-garde aesthetics and CL's individual attitude. Whether it's street style or high fashion, this collection can fulfill all your fashion fantasies! Upper: Sheepskin/Denim Sole: Original molded sole Size: 35-42 (Custom sizes 40, 41, 42 are non-returnable)
